issues.title: The default settings result in an unworkable library

comments.body: @ErykCh can you check latest M2 version to see if this is resolved?
There is now a PR in place that targets this unexpected behaviour: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/2072

@ErykCh Thanks for reporting the issue. @meistermeier Thanks for the PR! 

Sorry about the delay in getting this in. We'll get the PR reviewed and merged soon.
